sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Methanex Reports on Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
feed.summary: Methanex Corporation announced the results from its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held on May 1, 2026. Shareholders approved the re-election of all twelve director nominees, the appointment of KPMG LLP as auditors, and an advisory resolution on executive compensation. The meeting also included a presentation by the President and CEO, Rich Sumner.

feed.title: Littelfuse (LFUS) SVP Maggie Chu sells 1,097 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Littelfuse (LFUS) Senior Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer, Maggie Chu, sold a total of 1,097 shares of company Common Stock in three open-market transactions. The sales, executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 9, 2025, occurred at prices around $392.47 and $396.90 per share. Following these transactions, Maggie Chu directly holds 6,001 shares of Littelfuse Common Stock.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 72,528 Shares of Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. $SWK
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. by 0.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 72,528 shares, but still owns 18,154,948 shares valued at approximately $1.35 billion. Other institutional investors like Ameriprise Financial Inc. and Freestone Grove Partners LP made significant adjustments to their positions, with 87.77% of the stock currently held by institutional investors. Stanley Black & Decker reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $86.00.

feed.title: Pinnacle West Capital Corporation $PNW Stake Cut by Vanguard Group Inc.
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Pinnacle West Capital Corporation (NYSE:PNW) by 0.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 11,255 shares but still owning 12.25% of the company. Despite Vanguard's slight reduction, several other institutional investors increased their positions in PNW during the third quarter. The article also provides an overview of analyst ratings, price performance, recent earnings, and dividend information for Pinnacle West Capital.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Boosts Stock Holdings in Nordson Corporation $NDSN
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Nordson Corporation by 3.1% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 6,257,600 shares valued at over $1.5 billion. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, with hedge funds and institutional investors collectively owning 72.11% of the company's stock. Nordson recently reported strong quarterly earnings and declared a quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $311.50.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 377,415 Shares of Domino's Pizza Inc $DPZ
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Domino's Pizza Inc by 9.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 377,415 shares, though it still holds a significant 10.80% of the company. Other major investors like Berkshire Hathaway and Principal Financial Group increased their holdings in DPZ during the third quarter. Domino's Pizza recently missed its Q1 earnings per share consensus estimate and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.99, contributing to an annualized dividend of $7.96.

feed.title: Hasbro, Inc. $HAS Shares Bought by Vanguard Group Inc.
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Hasbro, Inc. by 2.7% during the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 453,038 shares. Other institutional investors like Brighton Jones LLC and MIRAE ASSET GLOBAL ETFS HOLDINGS Ltd. also adjusted their positions. Wall Street analysts have issued a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $113.07 for Hasbro, which recently reported impressive quarterly earnings and declared a dividend.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Purchases 947,693 Shares of Invesco Ltd. $IVZ
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Invesco Ltd. (NYSE:IVZ) by 1.8% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 947,693 shares and bringing its total holdings to over 52.9 million shares valued at approximately $1.39 billion. Other institutional investors like State Street Corp and Dimensional Fund Advisors also increased their positions. Invesco recently reported quarterly earnings, missing analyst estimates slightly, but declared an increased quarterly dividend of $0.215, representing an annualized dividend of $0.86 and a yield of 3.3%.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 31,941 Shares of EPAM Systems, Inc. $EPAM
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in EPAM Systems, Inc. by 0.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 31,941 shares, though it still holds a significant position worth over $1.43 billion. Other institutional investors have adjusted their holdings, while Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for EPAM Systems with an average price target of $191.93. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Decreases Stock Position in IDEX Corporation $IEX
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in IDEX Corporation by 1.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 100,375 shares and owning approximately 12.01% of the company's stock. Despite Vanguard's reduction, other institutional investors have increased their positions in IDEX. The industrial products company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has received several "buy" ratings and increased price targets from Wall Street analysts.

feed.title: Johnson Controls to present at the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International plc (JCI) is scheduled to present at the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference. This announcement was delivered via Quantisnow, a real-time market data and news platform. The article also provides recent analyst ratings and related press releases concerning Johnson Controls.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Decreases Stock Position in Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. $LECO
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. by 1.6% in the fourth quarter, selling over 84,000 shares but still owning 9.66% of the company. Despite this decrease, other hedge funds significantly increased their positions in Lincoln Electric. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, exceeding analyst expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Maintains Buy Opinion On Shares Of Apple Inc.
feed.summary: CFRA has reaffirmed its Buy rating on Apple Inc. shares. This indicates the firm's continued positive outlook on the company's stock.

feed.title: Truist Financial Maintains Eli Lilly and Co(LLY.US) With Buy Rating, Announces Target Price $1,281
feed.summary: Truist Financial has reaffirmed its Buy rating on Eli Lilly and Co (LLY.US) and has set a target price of $1,281 for the company's stock. This indicates a positive outlook from the firm regarding Eli Lilly's future performance.

feed.title: Johnson Controls CEO, CFO to appear in May 20 webcast chat
feed.summary: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) announced that its CEO, Joakim Weidemanis, and EVP & CFO, Marc Vandiepenbeeck, will participate in a fireside chat at the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference on May 20, 2026, at 8:05 a.m. EDT. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on the company's investor relations website. This engagement follows a steady trend of investor-relations activities and recent disclosures on sustainability and governance.

feed.title: As of May 1, LINKBANCORP is merged into Burke & Herbert
feed.summary: Burke & Herbert Financial Services Corp. (Nasdaq: BHRB) announced the completion of its merger with LINKBANCORP, Inc. (LNKB), effective May 1, 2026. As a result, LINKBANK has been integrated into Burke & Herbert Bank & Trust Company. The combined entity will continue to trade under the NASDAQ ticker BHRB.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks ties June 2 earnings timing to CyberArk close
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks announced it will release its fiscal third-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, after U.S. markets close. The company will host a live video webcast to discuss the results, with the timing of the announcement influenced by the recent closing of its CyberArk acquisition. These results will cover the period ending April 30, 2026.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Adjusts Price Target on Air Products and Chemicals to $345 From $330
feed.summary: BNP Paribas has raised its price target for Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE:APD) to $345 from $330. This adjustment comes amidst a series of similar price target changes from other financial institutions, including Jefferies, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, and JPMorgan. The article also notes that BMO Capital upgraded Air Products and Chemicals to Outperform from Market Perform.

feed.title: Summit Place Financial Advisors LLC Sells 10,021 Shares of Yum! Brands, Inc. $YUM
feed.summary: Summit Place Financial Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Yum! Brands, Inc. by selling 10,021 shares in the fourth quarter, retaining 3,564 shares valued at $539,000. This divestment occurred as Yum! Brands reported a strong first quarter with better-than-expected EPS and revenue, driven by Taco Bell and international KFC growth, despite some weakness in Pizza Hut. However, recent insider selling by executives like CEO Aaron Powell also marked a trend of divestment from within the company.

feed.title: 908 Devices to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 6, 2026
feed.summary: 908 Devices Inc. (Nasdaq: MASS) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. Following the release, company management will host a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The webcast will be accessible through the "Investors" section of the company's website.

feed.title: Burke & Herbert Financial Services Corp. Completes Merger with LINKBANCORP, Inc.
feed.summary: Burke & Herbert Financial Services Corp. (Nasdaq: BHRB) announced the completion of its merger with LINKBANCORP, Inc. (LNKB), effective May 1, 2026. This merger also included the integration of LINKBANK into Burke & Herbert Bank & Trust Company. Burke & Herbert Bank & Trust Company will operate with nearly 100 branches across multiple states, offering a full range of financial solutions.

feed.title: Littelfuse (NASDAQ:LFUS) Coverage Initiated by Analysts at Needham & Company LLC
feed.summary: Needham & Company LLC initiated coverage on Littelfuse (NASDAQ:LFUS) with a "buy" rating and a $450 price target, representing an 11.34% potential upside. This comes after the technology company reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue expectations. Despite some insider selling, institutional investors hold a significant majority of the company's stock.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target on Arista Networks to $180 From $165, Keeps Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Arista Networks (ANET) to $180 from $165, while reiterating an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a continued positive outlook from the financial firm on the networking company's performance and prospects. The article also lists other recent analyst and insider trading activities related to Arista Networks.

feed.title: KeyBanc Adjusts Price Target on Monolithic Power Systems to $2,000 From $1,500
feed.summary: KeyBanc has increased its price target for Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) to $2,000, up from the previous target of $1,500. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm for the semiconductor company. The article also lists several other analyst firms that have recently raised their price targets for Monolithic Power Systems, with new targets ranging from $1,575 to $1,860.

feed.title: Coca-Cola vs. PepsiCo: Which Stock Is the Better Buy?
feed.summary: Coca-Cola and PepsiCo both showed renewed sales growth recently, but Coca-Cola has historically generated higher total returns. While both are Dividend Kings, PepsiCo offers a higher dividend yield, making it more attractive for income investors, though neither stock has outperformed the S&P 500 in total returns over the last five years. The choice between the two depends on an investor's goals, with PepsiCo edging out Coca-Cola for income generation.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial : completes acquisition of Clark Capital Management Group
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has completed its acquisition of Clark Capital Management Group, a leading asset management firm. Clark Capital will operate as an independent boutique investment manager within Raymond James Investment Management, retaining its brand, leadership, investment philosophy, and service model. This acquisition enhances Raymond James Investment Management's offerings for financial advisors and their clients, leveraging Clark Capital's wealth-focused solutions and multi-asset-class strategies.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts O'Reilly Automotive Price Target to $98 From $91
feed.summary: Baird has adjusted its price target for O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) to $98, an increase from its previous target of $91. This update reflects the analyst firm's revised outlook for the automotive parts distributor. The article also notes other recent analyst adjustments for O'Reilly Automotive from firms like Goldman Sachs, Raymond James, Citigroup, and TD Cowen.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $4.22. The company's refining system optimized well despite commodity market disruptions, particularly benefiting from wider crude differentials and strong demand for transportation fuels. Valero maintained a strong balance sheet, returned $938 million to shareholders, and continued progress on the FCC unit optimization project at its St. Charles refinery while also addressing the impact of an incident at its Port Arthur refinery.

feed.title: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) reported Q1 2026 earnings, missing expectations with an EPS of $0.85 against an anticipated $0.94 due to lower volumes and transaction expenses. The company highlighted a 2% decrease in total sales to $946 million, with North America sales up 1% and Rest of World sales down 11%. Despite challenges such as weather-related disruptions, soft consumer demand in China, and rising material costs, A. O. Smith maintained strong free cash flow and focused on operational excellence, M&A opportunities, and strategic adjustments to product lines and pricing to navigate market headwinds.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) reported strong Q1 2026 results, beating earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.72 against an expectation of $2.53, and achieving 15% organic revenue growth. The company highlighted its "Trusted Disruptor" strategy, aligning with government demand for defense modernization and capacity expansion, especially in missile solutions, space systems, and resilient communications. They introduced their new missile company name, AXYV, and reaffirmed full-year revenue and operating margin guidance, while increasing GAAP EPS.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock Confirms Total Voting Rights After Share Capital Update
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc announced that its issued share capital consists of 524,464,078 ordinary shares and no treasury shares as of April 30, 2026. This means the total number of voting rights outstanding is equal to the full issued share count, which is crucial for compliance with UK transparency rules. The update provides clarity for shareholders and regulators regarding disclosure obligations.

feed.title: General Dynamics (GD) Receives a Hold from RBC Capital
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Kenneth Herbert maintained a Hold rating on General Dynamics (GD) with a price target of $385.00, while UBS also issued a Hold rating with a $371.00 price target. The company recently reported quarterly revenues of $13.48 billion and a net profit of $1.13 billion, an increase from the previous year. Insider sentiment is noted as negative, with a significant sale of shares by the Chairman & CEO last month.

feed.title: ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: ResMed Inc. reported strong Q3 fiscal year 2026 results with 11% revenue growth (8% constant currency) and 21% non-GAAP EPS growth, driven by operational excellence and innovation, particularly in fabric-based masks and the AirSense 11 platform. The company announced the acquisition of Noctrix for $340 million, expanding into restless leg syndrome treatment, and highlighted the positive impact of GLP-1 therapies on CPAP adherence and resupply. ResMed maintained its long-term outlook for high single-digit revenue growth and higher earnings growth, emphasizing its robust free cash flow and commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation reported record Q3 2026 results, with sales of $5.5 billion, adjusted EPS of $8.17, and a record backlog of $12.5 billion. The company raised its fiscal year 2026 organic sales growth guidance to 5.5% and increased its aerospace organic growth forecast to 12% due to continued commercial strength. Parker-Hannifin also provided positive outlooks for industrial markets and expects another record year in 2026, with free cash flow projected to be between $3.3 billion and $3.6 billion.

feed.title: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corporation reported stronger-than-expected Q1 2026 results, with EPS of $0.57 against an estimated $0.508. The company highlighted strong demand for commercial HVAC and aftermarket solutions, particularly in data centers, and managed to offset macroeconomic headwinds and increased input costs with supply chain actions, cost reductions, and increased pricing. Despite continued macro uncertainty, Carrier reaffirmed its full-year financial outlook, expecting significant growth in the second half driven by data centers.

feed.title: Analysts Are Bullish on Top Financial Stocks: Hanover Insurance (THG), Citigroup (C)
feed.summary: Analysts from Piper Sandler have issued bullish ratings for several financial stocks, including Hanover Insurance (THG), Citigroup (C), and Provident Financial Services (PFS). Paul Newsome maintained a Buy rating on Hanover Insurance with a $204 price target, Scott Siefers held a Buy rating for Citigroup with a $145 price target, and Manuel Navas maintained a Buy rating for Provident Financial Services with a $25 price target. These recommendations suggest potential upside for these companies based on current analyst consensus.

feed.title: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE: BAX) reported its Q1 2026 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $0.37 against an expected $0.31. The company reiterated its full-year 2026 financial outlook, anticipating flat to 1% reported sales growth and adjusted earnings of $1.85 to $2.05 per diluted share, with performance expected to improve in the second half of the year. Key initiatives highlighted include stabilizing the business, strengthening the balance sheet through debt reduction, and driving continuous improvement via the Baxter Growth and Performance System (GPS).

feed.title: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $5.15 against an anticipated $4.77. The company highlighted the successful performance of its six key growth drivers, particularly Repatha and Evenity, and provided updates on its pipeline, including the promising obesity drug Meritide, with new Phase III studies focusing on less frequent dosing and switching from other injectables. Amgen also discussed its increasing use of AI in R&D and manufacturing, and raised its full-year 2026 revenue and non-GAAP EPS guidance.

feed.title: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. reported a strong Q1 2026, exceeding earnings expectations with an adjusted diluted EPS of $1.32. The company saw robust performance in its smokeable products segment, and its oral nicotine pouch brand 'on!' expanded distribution nationwide, including 'on! PLUS'. Despite macroeconomic challenges and continued prevalence of illicit e-vapor products, Altria reaffirmed its full-year 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance, attributing a more balanced growth projection to moderated cross-category movement from e-vapor to cigarettes and prudent financial management.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) reported a strong Q1 2026, with revenues increasing 17% to a record $1.4 billion and organic aggregate shipments growing 7.2%, exceeding guidance. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 adjusted EBITDA guidance of $2.43 billion at the midpoint, citing robust infrastructure and heavy nonresidential demand, successful integration of the Quikrete asset exchange, and the announced acquisition of New Frontier Materials. Executives expressed confidence in continued strong performance, anticipating higher realization of mid-year price increases and positive trends in core markets despite residential and light nonresidential headwinds.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) reported Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with revenues of $16.3 billion, driven by strong performance in oncology, animal health, and new product contributions. The company raised its full-year revenue and EPS guidance and highlighted significant pipeline progress, including the FDA approval of IDVYNSO for HIV-1 and priority review designations for several other key candidates. Merck also discussed strategic business development, particularly the acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals, and its focus on leveraging AI and optimizing commercial structures to drive sustained growth and innovation.

feed.title: Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE:HUBB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Hubbell Incorporated reported strong Q1 2026 results with double-digit growth in sales, adjusted operating profit, and EPS, driven by robust demand in Electrical Solutions and Utility Solutions segments. The company raised its full-year 2026 outlook for sales growth, organic sales growth, and adjusted earnings per share, emphasizing its strong position in attractive end markets like utility T&D and data centers. Hubbell is also investing in high-voltage transmission, an emerging growth opportunity, and managing inflationary pressures with pricing and productivity actions.

feed.title: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. (NASDAQ:LOPE) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. (NASDAQ: LOPE) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $2.86 against forecasts of $2.78. The company observed significant online enrollment growth of 8.8% and hybrid growth of 20.3%, attributing success to flexible models, rapid response capabilities, and advanced technologies, including AI integration. GC Education emphasized its commitment to addressing workforce shortages through diverse academic programs and strong partnerships, highlighting its transformation into a large, impactful educational service provider.

feed.title: Should Wren Kitchens’ Collapse and Service Strains Require Action From Home Depot (HD) Investors?
feed.summary: Home Depot's partner Wren Kitchens filed for bankruptcy, shutting down U.S. operations and causing customer disruption, which could impact Home Depot's brand and operational resilience. This event, coupled with union tensions and Home Depot's efforts to improve customer service through AI, highlights current operational strains and risks. Investors are advised to consider these factors alongside Home Depot's growth forecasts and fair value estimates.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To First Solar (FSLR) Record Q1 Results And Expanding Margins
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) reported record first-quarter 2026 results with strong sales and net income, exceeding analyst expectations and showing significant margin expansion. The company's U.S. manufacturing footprint, differentiated thin film technology, and policy support continue to drive its investment narrative, reinforced by a reaffirmed 2026 guidance despite sector headwinds. While the record quarter supports a strong future outlook, investors should consider potential policy and tariff risks, alongside competitive pressures from Asian manufacturers.

feed.title: How FactSet’s Whole Portfolio Distribution Launch With J.P. Morgan (FDS) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. and J.P. Morgan launched the industry's first Whole Portfolio Distribution solution, aiming to automate data normalization and analytics for institutional investors. This collaboration aligns with FactSet's strategy to expand enterprise data deals and leverage CEO Sanoke Viswanathan's background in global banking to deepen partnerships. While the launch supports driving higher-value enterprise contracts, investors should consider potential challenges from rising technology and cloud costs, as well as pressures on client budgets.

feed.title: $0.5625 payout lands June 1 for Lincoln Financial preferred holders
feed.summary: Lincoln Financial (NYSE: LNC) announced a quarterly dividend of $562.50 per share for its 9.000% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series D. This translates to $0.5625 per depositary share for holders, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 15, 2026. The company provides financial services including annuities, life insurance, group protection, and retirement plan services, managing significant account balances as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Names Targa Resources Top Midstream Pick
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has named Targa Resources (TRGP) as its top pick in the midstream energy infrastructure sector, maintaining an Overweight rating and setting a $327 price target. This decision is driven by expected increases in Permian Basin gas production and broader investor interest in natural gas assets, further supported by Goldman Sachs also raising its price target for TRGP. Targa Resources has also increased its quarterly dividend to $1.25 per share.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. held its Q1 2026 earnings call, discussing its strategic focus on experiential real estate and reiterating strong financial performance. The company highlighted significant investment activities, including a $1.5 billion mezzanine loan for the One Beverly Hills development and the pending $1.16 billion Golden transaction, which marks VICI's entry into the Las Vegas locals market. VICI also raised its 2026 AFFO guidance and emphasized its commitment to growing its dividend and diversifying its tenant base.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:TYL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies reported a strong start to 2026 with record-high total and recurring revenues, and significantly increased free cash flow, driven by robust public sector demand and cloud momentum. The company emphasized its confidence in its cloud transition and AI-enabled applications, while detailing the impact of the For The Record acquisition on its financial outlook and market expansion strategies. Executives also discussed the growing adoption of AI solutions and the company's capital allocation strategy, including share repurchases.
